meaning: n.烤架,铁格子,烤肉v.烧,烤,严加盘问
examples: Place under a hot grill until the nuts have toasted.
Apart from peppers and eggplant, many other vegetables grill well.
The theme continues out into the garden where Kywon Datham is working the grill.
If the humidity and your stomach allow, the Jamaican Grill is worth a stop for lunch.
